elements.original_description: A green dollar bill with legs running on a treadmill, sweating profusely, with a red arrow pointing downward next to it. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a green US dollar bill with anthropomorphic legs running vigorously on a treadmill, depicted with sweat droplets flying off to show exhaustion, and a bold red downward-pointing arrow positioned beside it, symbolizing loss. Pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text or letters.

elements.original_description: A price tag with a shopping cart and groceries, with a large '3%' icon floating above, surrounded by upward-pointing arrows. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a price tag attached to a shopping cart filled with generic groceries, with a large '3%' icon floating prominently above it, surrounded by multiple upward-pointing arrows to indicate increase. Pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text or letters.
